text.title: Poetry Project Setup — Failure Modes
text.summary: Antipatterns observed when python-poetry-setup is mis-applied, each with symptom, root cause, and concrete fix.

antipattern.description: ^2.0 dependency constraints in a publishable library.
antipattern.reason: Root cause: Users locked to 2.x even if 3.x is compatible. Fix: Use >=2.0,<3 for libraries; reserve caret for applications.
Root cause: Each install resolves differently; reproducibility gone. Fix: Commit the lockfile.
Root cause: Two sources of truth; drift inevitable. Fix: Pick one; if Poetry, delete requirements.txt or regenerate it from poetry export.
Root cause: Production install pulls in dev tooling. Fix: Move to [tool.poetry.group.dev.dependencies].
